vocab.meaning: người trông rất khỏe mạnh và tràn đầy sức sống
vocab.example: Ever since she took up yoga and a balanced diet, she has been the absolute picture of health.

vocab.meaning: tràn đầy năng lượng, hăng hái
vocab.example: I always try to get at least eight hours of sleep so that I’m full of beans for my morning workout.

vocab.meaning: khỏe mạnh như vắt chanh, rất sung mãn
vocab.example: My grandfather is over eighty, but he’s still as fit as a fiddle because he walks everywhere.

vocab.meaning: thu lại kết quả tốt, hưởng thành quả
vocab.example: If you stick to a consistent exercise routine, you will definitely reap the rewards in the long run.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục sức khỏe (sau khi ốm)
vocab.example: Eating nutritious soups helped me get back on my feet much faster after the flu.

vocab.meaning: từ bỏ một thói quen xấu (thường là có hại cho sức khỏe)
vocab.example: It was difficult, but kicking the habit of eating late-night snacks significantly improved my digestion.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực nhiều hơn mức bình thường
vocab.example: When it comes to fitness, I’m willing to go the extra mile by hiring a personal trainer.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy hơi mệt, không được khỏe (sắc mặt không tốt)
vocab.example: I felt a bit off-color yesterday, so I decided to skip the gym and rest instead.

vocab.meaning: giữ cho vóc dáng thon gọn và khỏe khoắn
vocab.example: Swimming twice a week is my favorite way to keep in trim without putting too much strain on my joints.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn khỏe mạnh trở lại
vocab.example: I took a few days off to de-stress, and now I feel as right as rain.
